reference_policy: official/primary sources first; stricter risk interpretation wins

references.title: GateZero Project Truth
references.why: Defines what the product is and is not; prevents bot/profit hype drift.

references.title: GateZero Product Wedge
references.why: Locks the product promise: no trade without evidence, no execution without risk approval.

references.title: GateZero Risk Rules
references.why: Hard safety constraints that outrank feature appetite.

references.title: Financial Risk Gates
references.why: Defines the allowed autonomy level and promotion/rollback path.

references.title: QuantConnect LEAN Engine Docs
references.why: Professional reference for research/backtesting/live boundaries and algorithm lifecycle.

references.title: Backtrader Documentation
references.why: Strategy, indicator, analyzer, and backtest implementation patterns.

references.title: vectorbt Documentation
references.why: Fast vectorized strategy research using pandas/NumPy objects.

references.title: pandas Time Series User Guide
references.why: Time-index handling, resampling, timezone/date functionality for market data.

references.title: scikit-learn TimeSeriesSplit
references.why: Time-ordered cross-validation reference; helps avoid training on future data.

references.title: PyPortfolioOpt Documentation
references.why: Reference for portfolio optimization, covariance, efficient frontier, HRP/Black-Litterman ideas.
